segment.source: Renders an optional intro (eyebrow badge, heading, subheadline) above a horizontally scrollable track of team-member cards, each with a square portrait, name, optional role, and a view-profile button. Use it for: large teams where a grid would grow too long, people sections meant to be swiped on mobile, staff overviews with many similar entries. Prefer 'Team Section' for a static grid or list; use 'Content Carousel' for generic image slides.
